---
title: "Management"
description: The LMU Open Science Center is managed by Prof. Dr. Felix Schönbrodt and Dr. Malika Ihle who are responsible for the overall management of the center, including strategic planning, coordination of activities, and communication with stakeholders. They are supported by a team of [research assistants and administrative staff](staff.qmd) who help with the day-to-day operations of the center.
listing:
  - id: management
    contents: 
      - people
    template: listings/active-management-listing.ejs
    sort: "display_weight_management asc"

---

::: {#management}
:::
